title: Retail Advertising Firm Stratacache Liquidates Its U.K. Business
description: Stratacache, a company that sells in-store digital screens to retailers, is liquidating the U.K. arm of its business.

title: Marketers put up guardrails as AI agents reshape  programmatic buying
description: As AI agents enter programmatic advertising, marketers are adding guardrails to maintain oversight, transparency and control.

title: Modern Retail+ Research: Marketers’ AI use rises, but tech skills stall
description: Modern Retail’s survey — which has been conducted annually since 2022 — found that marketers’ adoption of AI technology has risen significantly. In 2022, 44% of brand and agency pros said their companies were investing in AI technology. That percentage rose to 57% in 2023 and 71% in 2024, before hitting 86% in 2025.

title: Tapestry builds AI-powered Mira to pull data, make decisions
description:
Tapestry Inc. is giving its employees a faster way to make retail decisions, using an artificial intelligence (AI) platform the company built in-house. The owner of Coach and Kate Spade recently secured a U.S. patent for Mira. The internal-facing AI system is designed to pull together data from across the business and surface insights “in […]
The post Tapestry builds AI-powered Mira to pull data, make decisions appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Google partners with Affirm, Klarna on BNPL for agentic commerce
description:
Google has partnered with payment companies Affirm and Klarna to make buy now, pay later (BNPL) offerings available through the AI Mode, where consumers can have artificial intelligence (AI) agents make purchases on their behalf — a process called agentic commerce. Affirm and Klarna are rolling out their payment options in traditional Google Search as […]
The post Google partners with Affirm, Klarna on BNPL for agentic commerce appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Amazon launches AI agent ‘Alexa for Shopping’
description:
Amazon has released a new feature, Alexa for Shopping, serving as an artificial intelligence (AI) agent — combining its Rufus and Alexa+ offerings. Rufus is an AI assistant that Amazon released in 2024, later updating it with new features ahead of the 2025 holiday season. Meanwhile, Alexa+ is an upgraded version of Amazon’s Alexa voice […]
The post Amazon launches AI agent ‘Alexa for Shopping’ appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: How B2B companies are using Mirakl’s catalog transformer
description:
Mirakl has been extending its list of clients using its catalog transformer to list products online — whether through a marketplace or an AI agent. Mirakl provides technology that enables companies to create their own marketplaces or sell on existing ones. And it provides essentially the same technology for wholesalers in the B2B context as […]
The post How B2B companies are using Mirakl’s catalog transformer appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Stripe, Google partner on agentic commerce
description: With a Google partnership, the payments processor is bringing agentic checkout to four of the largest AI platforms.

title: Organized retail crime bill passes House in bipartisan vote, heads to Senate
description: Industry groups have lobbied Congress to pass this legislation for years. But the impact on retailers’ efforts to prevent inventory loss remains unclear.

title: On maintains momentum with record Q1 sales
description: The athleticwear brand set a new baseline for gross margin with strong DTC and apparel growth but room for improvement in the Americas.

title: Foot Locker debuts year-round basketball brand platform under new chief marketer
description: Brett O’Brien, previously chief sports officer at PepsiCo, was appointed by the retailer after it was acquired by Dick’s Sporting Goods in September.

title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
description: Alexa for Shopping offers a voice- and touch-enabled shopping experience across mobile, desktop, and Echo Show smart displays. Alexa for Shopping provides more personalized recommendations and automates the shopping experience across Amazon and other online retailers.

title: Coca-Cola and partners pushing for new measurement standard
description:
The advertising leader and its partners aim to help marketers with one of today's most significant challenges. But details are sketchy. 
The post Coca-Cola and partners pushing for new measurement standard appeared first on MarTech.

title: Heineken urges US workers to embrace volunteer benefits and watch the World Cup
description: The brewer is offering soccer fans a way to find local volunteer opportunities that align with match days and is supporting the effort with a campaign.

title: CeraVe taps into basketball lore for latest social-first campaign
description: The L’Oréal-owned brand enlisted NBA legend Carmelo Anthony for a “Head Coach” campaign in support of its anti-dandruff products.
